features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.description: While unarmored, your AC equals 10 + Dex + Con modifier. You can use a shield.

features.name: Time Dragon Breath Weapon
features.description: As an action, exhale a 15-foot cone of temporal energy. Constitution saving throw or targets take 2d6 temporal force damage and speed is halved for 1 turn.

features.name: Breath Weapon Upgrade
features.description: Your Breath Weapon damage increases by 2d6 at levels 5 (4d6), 11 (6d6), and 17 (8d6).

features.name: Draconic Flight
features.description: Your wings mature. You gain a permanent flying speed equal to your walking speed.

features.name: Draconic Ascension
features.description: You permanently become a Large creature, your reach increases by 5 feet, and you gain force immunity.

features.name: Draconic Spellcasting
features.description: You learn to channel spells directly from your draconic bloodline using Charisma.
